comment_text.sn12.10:1.1: This is also told at SN 12.65. For the significance of the variations, see notes there.

root_text.sn12.10:1.1: “Pubbeva me, bhikkhave, sambodhā anabhisambuddhassa bodhisattasseva sato etadahosi:
root_text.sn12.10:1.2: ‘kicchaṁ vatāyaṁ loko āpanno jāyati ca jīyati ca mīyati ca cavati ca upapajjati ca.
root_text.sn12.10:1.3: Atha ca panimassa dukkhassa nissaraṇaṁ nappajānāti jarāmaraṇassa.
root_text.sn12.10:1.4: Kudāssu nāma imassa dukkhassa nissaraṇaṁ paññāyissati jarāmaraṇassā’ti?
root_text.sn12.10:2.2: ‘kimhi nu kho sati jarāmaraṇaṁ hoti, kiṁpaccayā jarāmaraṇan’ti?
root_text.sn12.10:2.3: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikārā ahu paññāya abhisamayo:
root_text.sn12.10:2.4: ‘jātiyā kho sati jarāmaraṇaṁ hoti, jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇan’ti.
root_text.sn12.10:3.12: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikārā ahu paññāya abhisamayo:
root_text.sn12.10:3.13: ‘avijjāya kho sati saṅkhārā honti, avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārā’ti.
root_text.sn12.10:4.4: ‘Samudayo, samudayo’ti kho me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṁ udapādi, ñāṇaṁ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādi.
root_text.sn12.10:5.2: ‘kimhi nu kho asati jarāmaraṇaṁ na hoti, kissa nirodhā jarāmaraṇanirodho’ti?
root_text.sn12.10:5.3: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikārā ahu paññāya abhisamayo:
root_text.sn12.10:5.4: ‘jātiyā kho asati jarāmaraṇaṁ na hoti, jātinirodhā jarāmaraṇanirodho’ti.
root_text.sn12.10:6.2: ‘kimhi nu kho asati jāti na hoti …pe…
root_text.sn12.10:6.11: saṅkhārā na honti, kissa nirodhā saṅkhāranirodho’ti?
root_text.sn12.10:6.12: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikārā ahu paññāya abhisamayo:
root_text.sn12.10:6.13: ‘avijjāya kho asati saṅkhārā na honti, avijjānirodhā saṅkhāranirodho’ti.
root_text.sn12.10:7.4: ‘Nirodho, nirodho’ti kho me, bhikkhave, pubbe ananussutesu dhammesu cakkhuṁ udapādi, ñāṇaṁ udapādi, paññā udapādi, vijjā udapādi, āloko udapādī”ti.

translation_text.sn12.10:1.1: “Mendicants, before my awakening—when I was still unawakened but intent on awakening—I thought:
translation_text.sn12.10:1.2: ‘Alas, this world has fallen into trouble. It’s born, grows old, dies, passes away, and is reborn,
translation_text.sn12.10:1.3: yet it doesn’t understand how to escape from this suffering, from old age and death.
translation_text.sn12.10:1.4: Oh, when will an escape be found from this suffering, from old age and death?’
translation_text.sn12.10:2.2: ‘When what exists is there old age and death? What is a requirement for old age and death?’
translation_text.sn12.10:2.3: Then, through rational application of mind, I penetrated with wisdom:
translation_text.sn12.10:2.4: ‘When rebirth exists there’s old age and death. Rebirth is a requirement for old age and death.’
translation_text.sn12.10:3.11: ‘When what exists are there choices? What is a requirement for choices?’
translation_text.sn12.10:3.12: Then, through rational application of mind, I penetrated with wisdom:
translation_text.sn12.10:3.13: ‘When ignorance exists there are choices. Ignorance is a requirement for choices.’
translation_text.sn12.10:4.1: And so, ignorance is a requirement for choices.
translation_text.sn12.10:4.2: Choices are a requirement for consciousness. …
translation_text.sn12.10:4.3: That is how this entire mass of suffering originates.
translation_text.sn12.10:4.4: ‘Origination, origination.’ Such was the vision, knowledge, wisdom, realization, and light that arose in me regarding teachings not learned before from another.
translation_text.sn12.10:5.2: ‘When what doesn’t exist is there no old age and death? When what ceases do old age and death cease?’
translation_text.sn12.10:5.3: Then, through rational application of mind, I penetrated with wisdom:
translation_text.sn12.10:5.4: ‘When rebirth doesn’t exist there’s no old age and death. When rebirth ceases, old age and death cease.’
translation_text.sn12.10:6.2: ‘When what doesn’t exist is there no rebirth? …
translation_text.sn12.10:6.11: ‘When what doesn’t exist are there no choices? When what ceases do choices cease?’
translation_text.sn12.10:6.12: Then, through rational application of mind, I penetrated with wisdom:
translation_text.sn12.10:6.13: ‘When ignorance doesn’t exist there are no choices. When ignorance ceases, choices cease.’
translation_text.sn12.10:7.1: And so, when ignorance ceases, choices cease.
translation_text.sn12.10:7.3: That is how this entire mass of suffering ceases.
translation_text.sn12.10:7.4: ‘Cessation, cessation.’ Such was the vision, knowledge, wisdom, realization, and light that arose in me regarding teachings not learned before from another.”
